[[Duchess/Legends|Duchess]] '''Geneer''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]], and the last sovereign to rule [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. She was removed from office by the corporations that dominated the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. She was later entombed in the [[Valley of Royalty]], in a [[Monument of Duchess Geneer|monument]] of the same name.

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1stm}}
